description_long: This sports center is a sprawling, multi-level complex featuring a variety of athletic facilities, including a large central building with a flat green roof, an outdoor tennis court, and a swimming pool area. The structure is composed of interconnected rectangular volumes, with open terraces and covered walkways linking different sections. The exterior is primarily finished in green, white, and gray, with blue accents marking the pool area and red for the tennis court. The design incorporates both open and enclosed spaces, with visible staircases and ramps providing access between levels. The overall layout suggests a modern, functional approach, prioritizing accessibility and a blend of indoor and outdoor sports amenities.
description: A large, modern sports center with flat green roofs, outdoor courts, a pool, and interconnected rectangular sections in green, white, and gray. Features open terraces, staircases, and a mix of indoor and outdoor athletic spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance area, central building mass, and adjacent outdoor sports facilities.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the multi-level structure, visible staircases, and the pool area on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the tennis court, additional terraces, and the extended layout of the complex.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focuses on the tennis court and the layered arrangement of the building's sections.
attribute_entrance_type: One main entrance with double doors, flat canopy above, and wide steps leading up.
attribute_roof_structure: Flat roof with green surfacing, some sections with overhangs and open terraces.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are sparse, mostly grouped in horizontal bands along the main building, with some large glass panels near entrances.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with Modernist influences, characterized by clean lines, flat roofs, and functional forms.
